message:
feat(providers,rpc): configurable Azure provider name and session path traversal prevention

Make the Azure OpenAI provider name configurable via with_provider_name()
instead of returning the hardcoded string "azure". The provider name is
now sourced from the config entry's model.provider field, so entries
using "azure-openai" or "azure-cognitive-services" report their actual
provider identity in events and diagnostics. The name() return type
widens from &'static str to &str to accommodate the owned string.

Harden the RPC switch_session handler to prevent directory traversal
attacks: relative session paths are now resolved against the sessions
directory and canonicalized, rejecting any path that escapes the
sessions directory boundary. Absolute paths are passed through unchanged
for backwards compatibility but relative paths like "../../../etc/passwd"
are now caught and rejected with an error response before Session::open
is called.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
